sections.content:
Looking at the maze structure:
- Player at rows 20-24, cols 26-30
- To the right (cols 32-38): white passages at rows 20-36
- Row 26-36: white passages spanning cols 26-38
- Row 37-38: white passages with black walls on left
- Row 39: black wall
- Row 40: red path
- Goal at rows 49-55, cols 43-49
The player is stuck at rows 20-24, cols 26-30. DOWN doesn't move the player further (only changes HUD). RIGHT from here didn't work earlier.
Looking at the maze, there's a large white passage area at rows 26-36, cols 26-38. The player needs to reach this area.
Let me try RIGHT from the current position to see if the player can move into the white passage area.
Wait, earlier RIGHT from rows 20-24, cols 26-30 didn't work (gameplay_changed: False). But maybe the maze structure changed?
Actually, looking at the ASCII:
Row 20: BbbbbbBWWWWWWWB
Row 21: BbbbbbBWWWWWWWB
Row 22: BbbBbbBWWWWWWWB
Row 23: BbbbbbBWWWWWWWB
Row 24: BbbbbbBWWWWWWWB
The player is at cols 26-30 (bbbbb). To the right at cols 32-38 is white (WWWWWWW). There's a black wall at col 31 (B).
So the player can't move RIGHT directly because there's a black wall. The player needs to find another path.
Let me try UP to see if the player can move back up, then find a different route.
Actually, wait. Looking at the maze more carefully:
- Rows 20-24: player room at cols 26-30, white passage at cols 32-38
- Row 25: black wall at cols 26-30, white passage at cols 32-38
- Rows 26-36: white passage at cols 26-38
- Row 37-38: black wall at col 26, white passage at cols 27-38
The player is in a room that's separated from the white passage by a black wall. The player needs to find a way to enter the white passage.
Let me try UP to go back up, then find a different route. Or maybe I need to use SPACE to change the maze structure.
Actually, let me re-examine. The player moved DOWN from rows 14-18 to rows 20-24. Maybe the player can move RIGHT from rows 14-18 instead of rows 20-24.
Let me try UP to go back to rows 14-18, then RIGHT.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model (updated):
- Player at rows 20-24, cols 26-30 (dead-end room)
- White passages to the right (cols 32-38) but blocked by black wall
- DOWN doesn't move player further
- Need to find path to white passages and goal
- Try UP to go back, then RIGHT from higher position

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at rows 20-24, try UP to go back to rows 14-18
result = action(['UP'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24:
        print(f"After UP: player at {n['boundary']}")
        break
print(f"Gameplay changed: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")

# Try RIGHT from rows 14-18
result = action(['RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24:
        print(f"After RIGHT: player at {n['boundary']}")
        break
print(f"Gameplay changed: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")

# Try DOWN from here
result = action(['DOWN'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24:
        print(f"After DOWN: player at {n['boundary']}")
        break
print(f"Gameplay changed: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")

# Check maze
ascii_grid = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nMaze (rows 13-30, cols 31-40):")
for i in range(13, 31):
    row = ascii_grid[i]
    print(f"Row {i:2d}: {row[31:40]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
